title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT Technologies:
NIIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies!
